subtopics.title: Meaning and Importance of Business
common_misconceptions: Business is only about making money
You need a lot of money to start a business
subtopics.teaching_note: Business: any activity that provides goods or services to satisfy human wants. Types: Trade (buying and selling), Commerce (trade + aids to trade), Industry (extraction, manufacturing, construction). Goods: tangible (clothes, food). Services: intangible (teaching, banking, transport). Nigerian businesses: Dangote Group, MTN, GTBank, small businesses (shops, tailoring, catering). Young entrepreneurs can start small: selling snacks, stationery, running errands.
